name: Monkey D. Luffy
devil_fruit: Gomu Gomu no Mi (Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika)
description: Rubber-bodied captain who dreams of becoming King of the Pirates.

name: Roronoa Zoro
description: Three-sword-style swordsman aiming to be the world's greatest.

name: Nami
description: Master navigator with a talent for weather and treasure.

name: Usopp
description: Long-nosed sharpshooter and teller of tall tales.

name: Vinsmoke Sanji
description: Chivalrous cook who fights only with his legs.

name: Tony Tony Chopper
description: Reindeer doctor who ate a Human-Human Fruit.

name: Nico Robin
description: Archaeologist who can read the lost Poneglyphs.

name: Franky
description: Cyborg shipwright who built the Thousand Sunny.

name: Brook
description: Living skeleton musician revived by the Revive-Revive Fruit.

name: Jinbe
description: Fish-man helmsman and master of Fish-Man Karate.

name: Portgas D. Ace
description: Luffy's sworn brother and wielder of the Flame-Flame Fruit.

name: Sabo
description: Revolutionary and Luffy's other sworn brother.

name: Trafalgar Law
description: Doctor-pirate wielding the reality-warping Op-Op Fruit.

name: Eustass Kid
description: Supernova captain who commands magnetic force.

name: Shanks
description: Yonko who inspired Luffy and gave him the straw hat.

name: Marshall D. Teach
devil_fruit: Yami Yami no Mi & Gura Gura no Mi
description: Yonko who wields two Devil Fruit powers.

name: Charlotte Linlin
description: Yonko who rules Totto Land with the Soul-Soul Fruit.

name: Kaido
devil_fruit: Uo Uo no Mi, Model: Seiryu
description: Yonko said to be the strongest creature alive.

name: Edward Newgate
description: The Strongest Man in the World, wielder of the Tremor-Tremor Fruit.

name: Marco

description: Whitebeard's right hand, a phoenix Zoan user.

name: Charlotte Katakuri
description: Big Mom's strongest son with future-sight Observation Haki.

name: Dracule Mihawk
description: The world's greatest swordsman and Zoro's goal.

name: Crocodile
description: Former Warlord who commands sand.

name: Donquixote Doflamingo
description: Former Warlord and Shichibukai who controls people like strings.

name: Boa Hancock
description: The most beautiful woman in the world, ruler of Amazon Lily.

name: Buggy
description: Chop-Chop Fruit user swept up into the ranks of the Yonko.

name: Monkey D. Dragon
description: The world's most wanted man and Luffy's father.

name: Monkey D. Garp
description: Legendary Marine hero and Luffy's grandfather.

name: Sengoku
devil_fruit: Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Daibutsu
description: Former Fleet Admiral who transforms into a great Buddha.

name: Sakazuki
description: Ruthless Fleet Admiral wielding magma.

name: Borsalino
description: Admiral who moves at the speed of light.

name: Kuzan
description: Former Marine admiral who commands ice.

name: Smoker
description: Cigar-chewing Marine who turns into smoke.

name: Koby
description: Marine prodigy who started out alongside Luffy.

name: Nefertari Vivi
description: Princess of Alabasta and honorary Straw Hat.
